title: Golden Cabbage Gratin
description: A vegan twist on the classic gratin, featuring golden and gooey cabbage goodness.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine cabbage and water. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to a simmer for 10 minutes.
Drain excess water from cabbage. Set aside.
In a separate pan, heat golden turmeric oil over medium heat.
Add nutritional yeast and stir until golden and gooey. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of breadcrumbs.
Add a layer of cabbage, then a layer of the golden gooeey mixture.
Repeat steps 9-10 until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of breadcrumbs.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
